title: FigmaToCode
name: github-electrofist-figmatocode
description: Paste a Figma link, preview the frame, and pull it into your project as HTML/CSS - right inside Phoenix Code. Includes a built-in step-by-step tutorial.
author: Krrish (https://github.com/Electrofist)

scripts.test: node test/generator.test.js && node test/assets.test.js && node test/stress.test.js
scripts.check: node --check main.js && node test/generator.test.js && node test/assets.test.js && node test/stress.test.js && node scripts/check-release-manifest.js
